/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libgo2_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libgo2_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/go2_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/go2_interfaces/srv/detail/checkpoint_capture__type_support_c.cpp.o CMakeFiles/go2_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/go2_interfaces/srv/detail/mission_control__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/foxy/lib:/home/unitree/go/Go2Robot/ros_ws/build/go2_interfaces: /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libgo2_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so libgo2_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/libfastrtps.so.2.1.4 /opt/ros/foxy/lib/libfoonathan_memory-0.7.1.a -lpthread /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libtinyxml2.so -lpthread /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libtinyxml2.so -ldl /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lrt /opt/ros/foxy/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.13
